summary: Phase 30A Patrol Route Map Visualization fully tested. Backend: 10/10 tests passed verifying route_geometry field structure (waypoints, segments, polyline, total_waypoints). Frontend: All map visualization features verified - Leaflet map with dark CartoDB tiles, numbered stop markers with priority colors, route polyline, map legend, summary overlay, zone selection syncing with map fly-to, 'Show full route' button, zone card expansion with score breakdown.
critical_code_review_comments: route_geometry field correctly structured with waypoints (start + stops), segments (consecutive pairs), polyline ([lat, lng] array), and total_waypoints count
Waypoint types properly labeled ('start' vs 'stop') with priority field for color coding
Segments correctly reference waypoint pairs with segment_index for route ordering
Polyline is array of [lat, lng] pairs suitable for react-leaflet Polyline component
Zone cards show priority badges with correct color coding (red=critical, orange=high, yellow=medium, green=low)
Zone selection highlights card with indigo background and triggers map.flyTo()
'Show full route' button appears when zone selected and resets selection when clicked
Map legend clearly shows all priority colors + Start marker + Route path indicator
Map overlay in top-right shows total distance (km), estimated time (min), and stops count
Score breakdown bars render correctly showing Forecast, Trend, Activity, Learning, Temporal with values
Night shift correctly changes composite scores and priority distribution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 30A adds route_geometry to patrol/generate API response containing waypoints, segments, polyline arrays for map visualization. Frontend PatrolAIDashboard renders Leaflet map with dark CartoDB tiles, numbered stop markers colored by priority, dashed indigo route polyline. Zone selection syncs with map via flyTo. Map legend and overlay show route summary. Test file: test_patrol_routing_map.py

backend_api_tests: route_geometry contains waypoints, segments, polyline, total_waypoints fields
waypoints array has start point (type='start', label='Start') + stop points with zone_id, priority
waypoints count equals route length + 1 (for start)
polyline is array of [lat, lng] pairs
segments array has n-1 entries for n waypoints, each with from/to/segment_index
GET /api/operator/patrol/generate?shift=night&max_zones=10 - night shift returns correct geometry
Zone objects have all popup fields: zone_name, composite_score, patrol_priority, stop_number, incident_count, score_breakdown
summary has map overlay fields: total_distance_km, total_estimated_minutes, total_zones
start_position field present with lat/lng for map start marker
priority_breakdown counts match route zone priorities
frontend_ui_tests: Patrol AI nav link visible in sidebar
Control panel with shift selector, max zones slider, dwell slider, generate button
Route generation returns 10 zones with map
Summary panel shows distance (15.19 km), time (130 min), zones (10), critical count
Route list shows 10 zone cards with numbered badges (1-10)
Map renders with dark CartoDB tiles
Map legend shows Critical, High, Medium, Low priorities + Start + Route path
Zone card click selects zone and triggers map.flyTo()
'Show full route' button appears when zone selected
Clicking 'Show full route' deselects zone and shows full route bounds
Zone card expansion shows score breakdown bars (Forecast, Trend, Activity, Learning, Temporal)
Shift selector allows changing to Night shift
Night shift route shows different scores and priority mix (9 critical, 1 high)

verified_features: GET /api/operator/patrol/generate returns route_geometry with waypoints, segments, polyline, total_waypoints
Waypoints include start point (type='start') and stop points with zone_id, priority, lat, lng
Polyline is array of [lat, lng] pairs for react-leaflet Polyline component
Leaflet map with dark CartoDB tiles (https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/)
Numbered stop markers colored by priority (red=critical, orange=high, yellow=medium, green=low)
Route polyline (dashed indigo line connecting all stops)
Map legend showing priority colors, start marker, route path
Map overlay showing total distance, estimated time, stops count
Zone selection syncs with map via flyTo animation
'Show full route' button resets selection and fits all bounds
Zone cards expandable with score breakdown (Forecast, Trend, Activity, Learning, Temporal)
Summary cards show distance (km), time (min), zones count, critical count
